description_long: This object consists of a small stack of two old, hardbound books with visibly worn covers and textured, brownish spines. The top book features an ornate, decorative front cover with a central geometric pattern in muted gold and green tones, surrounded by a border of intricate motifs. The lower book is darker, with a plain, heavily textured cover and subtle embossed designs along the spine and edges. Both books have thick, slightly yellowed pages visible along the sides, suggesting age and frequent use. The covers appear to be made of leather or a similar material, with a matte, slightly rough finish. The books are stacked at a slight angle, giving the arrangement a casual, natural appearance.
description: A stack of two old, hardbound books, one with an ornate, patterned cover and the other with a plain, textured surface. The books show signs of age and wear, with thick, yellowed pages and decorative details.
description_view_0: The front and side of both books are visible, highlighting the ornate cover of the top book and the textured, dark cover of the bottom book.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the full decorative pattern on the upper book's cover and the stacked arrangement of the books.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the stack is shown, with the patterned cover of the top book facing forward and the plain book's spine visible.
description_view_3: A rear angle displays the backs and spines of both books, emphasizing the embossed details and the thickness of the volumes.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover of the top book features an ornate, symmetrical geometric pattern in gold and green, surrounded by a decorative border. The design is intricate and classical, with no visible imagery of people, animals, or landscapes.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are dark brown with subtle embossed patterns and no visible text. The design is classical and decorative, matching the aged appearance of the books.
